## How Do You Post 'Quaso'?

Often, "quaso" will be posted as a duet with somebody talking about croissants in a more conventional way. For example, "quaso" is often paired with a pretty normal dialogue about a hungry person going to buy a croissant in the morning.

> QUASO 🥐#LeagueOfLegends #fiora #vayne #creadoresdelollatam pic.twitter.com/84w3cr9ikG
>
> — leochamposa (COMMISSIONS OPEN) (@leochamposa) December 19, 2022

   

## How Does 'Quaso' Relate To Other Memes?

"Quaso" fits into a broader group of TikTok memes that focus on funny mispronunciations. Like wenomechainsama, this meme turns a familiar word into a goofy noise effect. It's kind of surreal, in that it finds fun in deranged language. [...] ### Essie World Cup Curse

#### Guides

# What Is A 'Quaso?'

The croissant and the quaso, another pastry

By  Aidan Walker 

Add to Google

     9109 views

•  Published January 12, 2023

Share →

Published January 12, 2023

Some words sound exactly like what they mean: moist, cranky, crunch… croissant. On TikTok, the word "croissant," and one wonderful mispronunciation of it, has picked up steam as a meme. But where did "quaso," the most iconic meme of French cuisine, come from?
